title: How to Actually Build Mobile Apps with AI in 2026 | A Complete Beginner's Tutorial
summary: A tutorial by JavaScript Mastery demonstrating how to build a Duolingo clone in React Native using "Practical Vibe Coding," a workflow that leverages AI agents and multiple development tools to accelerate mobile app development. The tutorial covers integrations with Vision Agents, Clerk authentication, PostHog analytics, CodeRabbit code review, and Stream communication APIs.
